footer.brandDescription: The largest CS2 community in Vietnam. Highly stable, high-performance servers with extremely low latency.
footer.serverTip: Open CS2 console, type connect [IP] to join

preloader.warningInitial: Playing games for more than 180 minutes a day will adversely affect your health.
preloader.warningStuck: If the loading screen is stuck or takes too long, please reload the page.

zsystems.title: zSystems
zsystems.subtitle: zSystems System Architecture
zsystems.description: zSystems and vhming are the ultimate advanced management system and user dashboard designed as an All-In-One (AIO) solution, delivering seamless operation, outstanding performance, and real-time database management.

features.engineDesc: Powered by next-gen processing modules offering sub-millisecond thread execution and robust performance handling.
features.cacheDesc: Persisted and synchronization via high-performance Redis cache clusters to serve massive user pools instantly.
features.architectureDesc: Robust protection against cyber threats, secure link protocols, and automated session checks built right into the core.
features.pipelineDesc: Optimized pipeline execution designed exclusively for high-demand gaming communities and multiplayer systems.

owner.label: SYSTEM OWNER
owner.name: luxiie
owner.desc: Legal representative, founder, and official copyright owner of the zSystems platform.

developer.label: LEAD PROGRAMMER
developer.name: vhming
developer.desc: Lead developer and chief architect building and operating the zSystems platform.

dmca.label: COPYRIGHT PROTECTION
dmca.name: DMCA Protected
dmca.desc: All content, design assets, and source code are digitally protected worldwide.

zsystems.footerText: Created by vhming with absolute excellence.
